title: Soccer tourney takes stance against GBV
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - This Valentine’s Day, the Greater Mossel Bay SAPS Football Club is celebrating love and unity and raising awareness against gender-based violence with a soccer tournament to be held at the Ext 23 sportsground.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - This Valentine’s Day, the Greater Mossel Bay SAPS Football Club is celebrating love and unity and raising awareness against gender-based violence with a soccer tournament to be held at the Ext 23 sportsground."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tournament will see 12 local teams, including the police’s, competing, all in the name of showing love and fighting gender-based violence through sport."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the founders of the police’s soccer team, and the tournament, Sergeant Malusi Matiya, said families, friends and couples are welcome to come and enjoy a day of fast-paced games and togetherness.","html":"One of the founders of the police’s soccer team, and the tournament, Sergeant Malusi Matiya, said families, friends and couples are welcome to come and enjoy a day of fast-paced games and togetherness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said he hoped those attending will take to heart the message of standing together against gender-based violence.","html":"He said he hoped those attending will take to heart the message of standing together against gender-based violence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The gates will open at 08:00 on 14 February, and there will be a few local businesses with stalls.","html":"The gates will open at 08:00 on 14 February, and there will be a few local businesses with stalls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To find out more about the tournament and how you can become involved, contact Matiya on 078 376 4346, Constable Xolile Speelman on 072 728 1432 or Khaya Bayi on 072 339 0291.","html":"To find out more about the tournament and how you can become involved, contact Matiya on 078 376 4346, Constable Xolile Speelman on 072 728 1432 or Khaya Bayi on 072 339 0291."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Soccer tourney takes stance against GBV
